background.label: Background
background.tip: Opacity of the source photo behind the triangles.

points.label: Points
points.tip: Opacity of the generated point overlay.

export.label: Export
export.tip: Download the triangulation in the chosen format.

errors.openProject: Failed to open the project file
errors.export: Failed to export (is an image loaded?)

cursor.label: Cursor
cursor.tip: Hover the canvas to highlight the nearest modifier, click to select. Esc or ~ returns here.

polyline.label: Polyline
polyline.tip: Click to add vertices. Space or click the first vertex to finish, Esc to cancel.

circle.label: Circle
circle.tip: Click a point on the edge, then the center.

catmullrom.label: Catmull-Rom curve
catmullrom.tip: Click to add control points. Space or click the first to finish, Esc to cancel.

modifiers.title: Modifiers
modifiers.hint: Non-destructive layers over the base points. Pick a tool on the left; select a card to edit its points on the stage. Drag cards to reorder or to move them between groups.

newGroup.label: New group
newGroup.tip: Create a group to organize modifiers.

modifiers.dragCard: Drag the card to reorder or move into a group

pointGen.title: Point generation
pointGen.hint: Bridson Poisson disk with variable radius from Sobel edges. Edges get min radius (dense); flat areas get max radius (sparse). Changes reseed the base (modifiers are kept).

color.title: Color
color.hint: Color sampled from the image. Changes recompute all colors.
